repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
repos.descriptionZh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

repos.name: chatwoot/chatwoot
repos.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬
repos.descriptionZh: 开源实时聊天、电子邮件支持、全渠道服务台。 Intercom、Zendesk、Salesforce Service Cloud 等的替代品。🔥💬

repos.name: krahets/hello-algo
repos.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现
repos.descriptionZh: 《Hello算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、英语、日本语，提供Python、Java、C++、C、C#、JS、Go、Swift、Rust、Ruby、Kotlin、TS、Dart等代码实现

repos.name: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
repos.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
repos.descriptionZh: freeCodeCamp.org 的开源代码库和课程。免费学习数学、编程和计算机科学。

repos.name: trycua/cua
repos.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
repos.descriptionZh: 计算机使用代理的开源基础设施。用于训练和评估可控制完整桌面（macOS、Linux、Windows）的 AI 代理的沙箱、SDK 和基准测试。

repos.name: jwasham/coding-interview-university
repos.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.
repos.descriptionZh: 成为软件工程师的完整计算机科学研究计划。

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
repos.descriptionZh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

repos.name: music-assistant/server
repos.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.
repos.descriptionZh: 音乐助手是一款免费的开源媒体库管理器，可连接到您的流媒体服务和各种连接的扬声器。服务器是跳动的心脏，是音乐助手的核心，必须在始终在线的设备上运行，例如 Raspberry Pi、NAS 或 Intel NUC 等。

repos.name: Free-TV/IPTV
repos.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels
repos.descriptionZh: 免费电视频道的 M3U 播放列表

repos.name: Raphire/Win11Debloat
repos.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
repos.descriptionZh: 一个简单、轻量级的 PowerShell 脚本，允许您删除预安装的应用程序、禁用遥测以及执行各种其他更改以整理和自定义您的 Windows 体验。 Win11Debloat 适用于 Windows 10 和 Windows 11。

repos.name: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
repos.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.
repos.descriptionZh: 自托管指南。了解有关您或您的组织本地托管（本地和私有 Web 服务器）和管理软件应用程序的所有信息。包括云、法学硕士、WireGuard、自动化、家庭助理和网络。

repos.name: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
repos.description: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.
repos.descriptionZh: 免费、开源的 Windows 优化工具，可实现性能、隐私和简单性。

repos.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
repos.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能的安全扫描器。检测漏洞、恶意模式和安全风险。
